---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] 在此概括遇到的bug / A summary of the bug"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**描述Bug / Describe the bug**
请在此写下关于bug的清晰简洁的描述
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**复现步骤 / To Reproduce**
请在此写下复现步骤
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**期望表现 / Expected behavior**
请简单清晰地描述您预期的结果
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**截图 / Screenshots**
如果可行，请添加一些截图来帮助描述您遇到的问题
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**桌面端 / Desktop**
 - 操作系统 / OS: [e.g. Windows]
 - Firefox版本 / Firefox version [e.g. Release 149.0]
 - Vault2FA版本 / Vault2FA version [e.g. 2.3.0]

**移动端 / Mobile**
 - 设备 / Device: [e.g. Motorola X70 air pro]
 - 操作系统 / OS: [e.g. Android 13 / MyOS]
 - Firefox版本 / Firefox version [e.g. Release 149.0]
 - Vault2FA版本 / Vaut2fa version[e.g. 2.3.0]

**附加内容 / Additional context**
在此添加任何有关bug的信息
Add any other context about the problem here.
